accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill; contextual description of environmental regulation is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all information traceable to bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as nullifying the WOTUS rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No effective date or sunset specified beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the sole operative provision of the resolution.

correct_entities.why: Agencies correctly named; statutory citation correct.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation 88 Fed. Reg. 3004 and date correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
